case_title: RICHARD ROE et al VS. WHITE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-09-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
